stemHtml: With regard to the Centre of Gravity limits of an aircraft, which one of the following statements is true?

options.a: The aircraft operator’s CG limitations can be more restrictive than the manufacturer’s CG limitations.
options.b: The manufacturer’s CG limitations can be more restrictive than the aircraft operator’s CG limitations.
options.c: It depends on the state of registry whether the manufacturer’s or the aircraft operator’s limitations on CG are more restrictive.
options.d: The CG limitations of the operator always have to be the same as the manufacturer’s limitations.
